# Return Shipping

Customers returning non-defective items pay a flat NT$80 return shipping fee, deducted from the refund. For defective products or items damaged in transit, acme-shop covers the return shipping cost. No restocking-fee is charged for any product category.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#return-shipping]
